title: Audit Associate/Senior
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Since its registration in 2006, Singapore Assurance PAC (the "firm") is committed to provide its client with high quality services and seek to add value through effective communication. Our Firm specialise in audit services for diverse industries. Our portfolio clientele range from small-medium enterprises to multi-national organisation as well as associations and non-profit organisations. Our audit partners, directors and managers are actively involved in the planning and execution of the audit, which provide client direct access to professionals throughout the audit process.

Job Summary

You will perform and manage statutory audit assignments and special audit engagements, driving accurate financial reporting and compliance with Singapore Financial Reporting Standards. You will collaborate in planning audits, preparing programs, and leading teams to deliver timely, high-quality audit outcomes.

Responsibilities

  • Lead and execute statutory audit assignments and special audit engagements to ensure compliance and accuracy
  • Prepare statutory financial statements in accordance with Singapore Financial Reporting Standards to meet regulatory requirements
  • Plan audit engagements by developing audit programs and assigning tasks to team members to optimize efficiency and quality
  • Collaborate on ad hoc projects and assignments to support business needs and continuous improvement
  • Manage deadlines effectively to ensure timely submission of audit reports and deliverables under tight schedules

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Accountancy or Finance recognized by ISCA or ACCA
  • Knowledge of auditing principles and practices
  • Exposure to International Financial Reporting Standards or Singapore Financial Reporting Standards
  • Understanding of group consolidation processes is an added advantage
  • Demonstrated proactive approach and commitment to meeting deadlines
  • Strong organizational skills and professional demeanor
  • Willingness to work overtime as required
  • Minimum of 1 year of relevant audit experience; at least 2 years for senior roles

SINGAPORE ASSURANCE PAC

 

Since its registration in 2006, Singapore Assurance PAC (the "firm") is committed to provide its client with high quality services and seek to add value through effective communication. Together with a team comprising 2 audit partners and 21 young professionls, our Firm specialise in audit services for diverse industries. Our portfolio clientele range from small-medium enterprises to multi-national organisation as well as associations and non-profit organisations. Our audit partners, directors and managers are actively involved in the planning and execution of the audit, which provide client direct access to professionals throughout the audit process.
